_doc: Provider-facing query payload for executeSearchQueries() and runSearchProviders(). Identical regardless of Schema 4 or fallback planner origin. Updated 2026-03-18.
queries: string - the query text sent to the internal corpus, frontier cache checks, and internet providers

per_query_metadata.target_fields: field keys this query aims to resolve
per_query_metadata.hint_source: schema4_search_plan | targeted | host_plan | base_template | fallback planner metadata

execution_config.searchEngines: string - configured internet providers from config.searchEngines

execution_phases: 2. Frontier query cooldown reuse before live provider execution.
4. Plan-only manufacturer URL fallback when no provider path is available and no results were collected.

output.rawResults: provider rows with url, title, snippet, provider, query, rank, and related fields
